introSection: Outpost Express is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Wild Adventures in Valdosta, Georgia, USA. From 2000 to 2018, the ride was known as Ant Farm Express.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: After the train climbs the lift hill, riders travel through several of twists and turns before reaching the brake run.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Yellow track and blue supports, used to have red track and blue supports.

fullText:
Outpost Express is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Wild Adventures in Valdosta, Georgia, USA. From 2000 to 2018, the ride was known as Ant Farm Express.

After the train climbs the lift hill, riders travel through several of twists and turns before reaching the brake run.

Yellow track and blue supports, used to have red track and blue supports.
